requirements.text: A conversation shall be the top-level entity, tied to a project directory path. It shall track: title, project_path, current phase, gate status, and active flag.

tests.description: GET /api/conversations/{id}/phase returns current phase and gate_status
POST /gate with approve advances phase to next in sequence
POST /gate with reject sets gate_status to rejected, phase unchanged
POST /gate on a done conversation returns 409
Test that inserting a task with invalid conversation_id raises IntegrityError
Test that inserting an artifact with invalid conversation_id raises IntegrityError
Test that inserting a message_event with invalid conversation_id raises IntegrityError
Test that migration from v4 to v5 preserves existing data while adding constraints
Test that all repository ABCs cannot be instantiated directly (abstract methods enforced)
Test that all repository ABCs define the required CRUD method signatures with correct type hints
Test that a minimal concrete subclass can be created by implementing all abstract methods
Test create conversation returns a Conversation with generated UUID, correct defaults for phase/gate_status/active
Test soft_delete sets deleted_at and list_active excludes the deleted conversation
Test select atomically deactivates all others and activates the target conversation
Test clear_all soft-deletes all conversations and returns the count

requirements.text: Conversations shall support soft deletion (via deleted_at timestamp). Listing endpoints shall exclude soft-deleted conversations by default.

tests.description: Test create conversation returns a Conversation with generated UUID, correct defaults for phase/gate_status/active
Test soft_delete sets deleted_at and list_active excludes the deleted conversation
Test select atomically deactivates all others and activates the target conversation
Test clear_all soft-deletes all conversations and returns the count

requirements.text: Only one conversation shall be active at a time. Selecting a conversation shall deactivate all others.

tests.description: Test create conversation returns a Conversation with generated UUID, correct defaults for phase/gate_status/active
Test soft_delete sets deleted_at and list_active excludes the deleted conversation
Test select atomically deactivates all others and activates the target conversation
Test clear_all soft-deletes all conversations and returns the count

requirements.text: Each agent shall have a globally unique ID, display name, provider (claude, codex, ollama, gemini), model identifier, role (analyst, team_lead, developer), personality key, and status (idle, running, blocked, offline).

tests.description: GET /api/agents/{id}/status returns current status
PATCH /api/agents/{id}/status accepts valid transition idle -> running
PATCH /api/agents/{id}/status rejects invalid transition idle -> blocked
Status change emits agent_status_change system event
Test that all repository ABCs cannot be instantiated directly (abstract methods enforced)
Test that all repository ABCs define the required CRUD method signatures with correct type hints
Test that a minimal concrete subclass can be created by implementing all abstract methods
Test create agent with valid provider/role returns Agent with generated UUID and idle status
Test create agent with invalid provider raises ValueError
Test delete agent cascades to remove conversation_agent join rows
Test list_all returns agents ordered by sort_order ascending, then display_name

requirements.text: Agents shall be scoped to conversations via a join table (conversation_agent). Each join record shall include: turn_order (for round-robin sequencing), enabled flag, and permission_profile.

tests.description: POST /api/conversations/{id}/agents links agent with auto-assigned turn_order
Duplicate agent assignment returns 409 Conflict
is_merge_coordinator flag is stored and returned correctly
Test add_agent auto-assigns turn_order as max(existing)+1, starting from 1
Test adding same agent to same conversation twice raises IntegrityError (UNIQUE constraint)
Test reorder updates turn_order for all agents atomically in the specified order
Test set_merge_coordinator clears existing coordinator and sets the new one

requirements.text: When an agent is added to a conversation, the system shall auto-assign the next turn_order value (max existing + 1, starting from 1).

tests.description: POST /api/conversations/{id}/agents links agent with auto-assigned turn_order
Duplicate agent assignment returns 409 Conflict
is_merge_coordinator flag is stored and returned correctly
Test add_agent auto-assigns turn_order as max(existing)+1, starting from 1
Test adding same agent to same conversation twice raises IntegrityError (UNIQUE constraint)
Test reorder updates turn_order for all agents atomically in the specified order
Test set_merge_coordinator clears existing coordinator and sets the new one

requirements.text: An agent marked as is_merge_coordinator in a conversation shall be designated to manage the merge queue. Typically this is the Ollama Team Lead.

tests.description: POST /api/conversations/{id}/agents links agent with auto-assigned turn_order
Duplicate agent assignment returns 409 Conflict
is_merge_coordinator flag is stored and returned correctly
Test add_agent auto-assigns turn_order as max(existing)+1, starting from 1
Test adding same agent to same conversation twice raises IntegrityError (UNIQUE constraint)
Test reorder updates turn_order for all agents atomically in the specified order
Test set_merge_coordinator clears existing coordinator and sets the new one

requirements.text: A task shall belong to a conversation and track: title, specification (JSON), status, priority, owner agent, dependencies (as JSON array of task IDs), timestamps, result summary, and evidence artifacts.

tests.description: POST /api/conversations/{id}/tasks creates a task with spec_json and returns it
GET /api/conversations/{id}/tasks lists all tasks ordered by priority
PATCH /api/tasks/{id} updates status through valid transitions
PATCH /api/tasks/{id} rejects invalid status transitions with 400
Test that inserting a task with invalid conversation_id raises IntegrityError
Test that inserting an artifact with invalid conversation_id raises IntegrityError
Test that inserting a message_event with invalid conversation_id raises IntegrityError
Test that migration from v4 to v5 preserves existing data while adding constraints
Test that all repository ABCs cannot be instantiated directly (abstract methods enforced)
Test that all repository ABCs define the required CRUD method signatures with correct type hints
Test that a minimal concrete subclass can be created by implementing all abstract methods
Test create task returns Task with default status 'todo' and correct conversation_id
Test update_status to 'implementing' is blocked when dependency tasks are not 'done'
Test update_status to 'implementing' succeeds when all dependency tasks are 'done'
Test list_by_conversation with status_filter returns only matching tasks

requirements.text: Task statuses shall be: todo, design, tdd, implementing, testing, pr_raised, in_review, fixing_comments, merging, done, blocked.

tests.description: POST /api/conversations/{id}/tasks creates a task with spec_json and returns it
GET /api/conversations/{id}/tasks lists all tasks ordered by priority
PATCH /api/tasks/{id} updates status through valid transitions
PATCH /api/tasks/{id} rejects invalid status transitions with 400
Test create task returns Task with default status 'todo' and correct conversation_id
Test update_status to 'implementing' is blocked when dependency tasks are not 'done'
Test update_status to 'implementing' succeeds when all dependency tasks are 'done'
Test list_by_conversation with status_filter returns only matching tasks
Test TaskStatus enum contains all 11 statuses from BE-R021
Test VALID_TRANSITIONS allows todo -> design but blocks todo -> implementing
Test EventType enum contains all 7 event types from BE-R031
Test MergeQueueStatus enum contains all 7 statuses (queued through blocked)

requirements.text: Tasks shall support dependency tracking. A task shall not transition to implementing until all its dependencies are done.

tests.description: POST /api/conversations/{id}/tasks creates a task with spec_json and returns it
GET /api/conversations/{id}/tasks lists all tasks ordered by priority
PATCH /api/tasks/{id} updates status through valid transitions
PATCH /api/tasks/{id} rejects invalid status transitions with 400
Task with unmet dependencies cannot transition to implementing, returns 409
Task with all dependencies done can transition to implementing
Task with empty depends_on_json transitions freely
Test create task returns Task with default status 'todo' and correct conversation_id
Test update_status to 'implementing' is blocked when dependency tasks are not 'done'
Test update_status to 'implementing' succeeds when all dependency tasks are 'done'
Test list_by_conversation with status_filter returns only matching tasks

requirements.text: All conversation events (chat messages, system events, phase transitions, steering inputs) shall be stored in a message_event table with: conversation_id, source type (customer, agent, system), source ID, text, event type, and metadata JSON.

tests.description: POST /api/conversations/{id}/messages creates a customer message event and returns it
POST with target_agent_id stores directed message metadata
GET /api/conversations/{id}/messages returns paginated results with ?after cursor
GET /api/conversations/{id}/messages returns 404 for non-existent conversation
create_agent_failure_event inserts system_notice event with correct metadata
Crash error event includes agent_id and error classification in metadata
Failure events appear in GET /api/conversations/{id}/messages timeline
Test that inserting a task with invalid conversation_id raises IntegrityError
Test that inserting an artifact with invalid conversation_id raises IntegrityError
Test that inserting a message_event with invalid conversation_id raises IntegrityError
Test that migration from v4 to v5 preserves existing data while adding constraints
Test that all repository ABCs cannot be instantiated directly (abstract methods enforced)
Test that all repository ABCs define the required CRUD method signatures with correct type hints
Test that a minimal concrete subclass can be created by implementing all abstract methods
Test append creates a message_event with unique UUID event_id and auto-increment id
Test list_by_conversation with after_id returns only events after the specified cursor
Test list_by_type filters events to only the specified event_type
Test that repository exposes no update or delete methods (append-only enforcement)
Test DualWriteMessageEventRepository.append writes to both SQLite and JSONL file
Test that JSONL entries contain event_id, conversation_id, source_type, event_type, text, and timestamp
Test EventLogReader.read_since with a known event_id returns only subsequent events
Test that JSONL write failure does not prevent SQLite write (graceful degradation)

requirements.text: The system shall store artifacts (design docs, task plans, summaries) linked to conversations and optionally to batch runs. Artifact types shall include: design_doc, task_plan, summary, checkpoint.

tests.description: Test that inserting a task with invalid conversation_id raises IntegrityError
Test that inserting an artifact with invalid conversation_id raises IntegrityError
Test that inserting a message_event with invalid conversation_id raises IntegrityError

requirements.text: The system shall use SQLite with WAL mode for persistence. The database file shall reside in a configurable local path (default: ~/.agent-orchestrator/orchestrator.db).

requirements.text: The database schema shall support forward migrations via a schema_version pragma. Each migration shall be idempotent.

tests.description: Test that initialize() on a fresh DB creates the merge_queue table with all expected columns
Test that migration from v3 to v4 adds merge_queue without data loss in existing tables
Test that merge_queue FK constraints enforce valid conversation_id, task_id, and author_agent_id references

Test that inserting a message_event with invalid conversation_id raises IntegrityError

requirements.text: The system shall maintain a JSONL event log as a secondary append-only store for debugging and replay. This is supplementary to the SQLite store.

tests.description: Test DualWriteMessageEventRepository.append writes to both SQLite and JSONL file
Test that JSONL entries contain event_id, conversation_id, source_type, event_type, text, and timestamp
Test EventLogReader.read_since with a known event_id returns only subsequent events
Test that JSONL write failure does not prevent SQLite write (graceful degradation)

requirements.text: The backend shall expose a REST API via FastAPI, served by uvicorn. All endpoints shall return a standard envelope: { "ok": bool, "data": T, "error"?: string }.

tests.description: GET /api/conversations/{id} returns full details with agent_count and task_count
GET /api/conversations/{id} returns 404 for non-existent or soft-deleted conversation
PATCH /api/conversations/{id} updates title and project_path, returns updated object
PATCH /api/conversations/{id} ignores null fields and returns 404 for missing conversation
POST /api/conversations/{id}/messages creates a customer message event and returns it
POST with target_agent_id stores directed message metadata
GET /api/conversations/{id}/messages returns paginated results with ?after cursor
GET /api/conversations/{id}/messages returns 404 for non-existent conversation
GET /api/conversations/{id}/events returns all events unfiltered
GET with ?event_type=chat_message filters correctly
GET with multiple event_type values (comma-separated) returns matching events
POST /api/conversations/{id}/tasks creates a task with spec_json and returns it
GET /api/conversations/{id}/tasks lists all tasks ordered by priority
PATCH /api/tasks/{id} updates status through valid transitions
PATCH /api/tasks/{id} rejects invalid status transitions with 400
GET /api/conversations/{id}/phase returns current phase and gate_status
POST /gate with approve advances phase to next in sequence
POST /gate with reject sets gate_status to rejected, phase unchanged
POST /gate on a done conversation returns 409
POST /merge-queue enqueues item at next position with status queued
GET /merge-queue returns items ordered by position
PATCH /merge-queue/{id} rejects merging when another item is already merging
DELETE /merge-queue/{id} removes item and recompacts positions
SSE stream delivers events in correct SSE envelope format
Last-Event-ID header causes replay of missed events
Heartbeat comments are sent to keep connection alive
Stream returns 404 for non-existent conversation
Agent activity stream delivers only events for the specified agent
Activity stream filters to activity-related event types
Agent activity stream supports Last-Event-ID reconnection
Unhandled exceptions return 500 with envelope format and no stack trace
Pydantic ValidationError returns 400 with field-level error details
Custom NotFoundError returns 404 with envelope
Custom ConflictError returns 409 with envelope
GET /api/agents/{id}/status returns current status
PATCH /api/agents/{id}/status accepts valid transition idle -> running
PATCH /api/agents/{id}/status rejects invalid transition idle -> blocked
Status change emits agent_status_change system event
POST /api/conversations/{id}/agents links agent with auto-assigned turn_order
Duplicate agent assignment returns 409 Conflict
is_merge_coordinator flag is stored and returned correctly

requirements.text: The API shall be prefixed under /api. The frontend dev server shall proxy /api/* to the backend.

tests.description: All new route modules are included in the FastAPI app
OpenAPI schema includes all new endpoints under /api prefix
No route path conflicts between existing and new routers

requirements.text: CORS shall be configured for local development (localhost + LAN IPs). In production mode, the frontend is served as static files from the backend and CORS is not needed.

tests.description: Test default config values are used when no environment variables are set
Test that environment variables override default config values
Test that DEV_MODE=true is parsed correctly from string env var
Test that DB_PATH expands ~ to user home directory

requirements.text: GET /api/conversations — List all non-deleted conversations. POST /api/conversations/new — Create conversation. POST /api/conversations/select — Set active. POST /api/conversations/delete — Soft-delete. POST /api/conversations/clear-all — Soft-delete all.

requirements.text: GET /api/conversations/{id} — Full details with phase, gate status, agent count. PATCH /api/conversations/{id} — Update metadata.

requirements.text: POST /api/agents — Create agent, optionally assign to conversation. POST /api/agents/update — Update properties. POST /api/agents/delete — Delete and cascade-remove from conversations.

GET with ?event_type=chat_message filters correctly

requirements.text: GET /api/conversations/{id}/tasks — List tasks. POST /api/conversations/{id}/tasks — Create task. PATCH /api/tasks/{task_id} — Update status, owner, result.

tests.description: POST /api/conversations/{id}/tasks creates a task with spec_json and returns it

requirements.text: POST /api/orchestration/{id}/run — Start batch. POST /api/orchestration/{id}/continue — Continue batch. POST /api/orchestration/{id}/stop — Stop batch. POST /api/orchestration/{id}/steer — Inject steering note.

tests.description: Steering notes appear in agent prompt prefix when pending
Batch pauses after batch_size turns and records scheduler_run as completed
Continue from paused state resumes with a new batch
Directed steer message (@AgentName) targets specific agent

requirements.text: The system shall provide a real-time event stream via Server-Sent Events (SSE) at GET /api/conversations/{id}/stream. Events include: new messages, phase changes, task updates, agent status changes.

tests.description: SSE stream delivers events in correct SSE envelope format
Last-Event-ID header causes replay of missed events
Heartbeat comments are sent to keep connection alive
Stream returns 404 for non-existent conversation
EventBus delivers published events to all matching subscribers
Subscriber with conversation_id filter only receives events for that conversation
Disconnected subscriber is cleaned up and does not block bus
Multiple concurrent subscribers receive events independently

requirements.text: The system shall provide a per-agent activity stream via SSE at GET /api/agents/{id}/activity. Events include: thinking output, tool calls, file reads/writes, shell commands, and their results.

tests.description: Agent activity stream delivers only events for the specified agent
Activity stream filters to activity-related event types
Agent activity stream supports Last-Event-ID reconnection
EventBus delivers published events to all matching subscribers

Disconnected subscriber is cleaned up and does not block bus

requirements.text: SSE streams shall support Last-Event-ID for reconnection. Missed events shall be replayed from the event store.

requirements.text: Creating an agent record does NOT start a process. Agent processes are started by the orchestration engine when a batch run begins or a task is assigned.

tests.description: AdapterEvent has all required type variants (thinking, text, tool_call, etc.)
send_prompt returns AsyncIterator[AdapterEvent] that can be consumed
stop() cancels an in-progress operation and yields a done event
Claude CLI is invoked with --output-format stream-json flag
Streaming JSON lines are parsed into correct AdapterEvent types
Model, max_tokens, and permission_profile are configurable per instance
Session resume uses --session-id flag and returns streaming events
Codex CLI is invoked with --approval-mode full-auto flag
Codex output is normalized into standard AdapterEvent stream
Non-zero exit code yields error AdapterEvent
Ollama adapter uses HTTP API (POST /api/generate) not CLI subprocess
Streaming HTTP response is parsed into AdapterEvent stream
is_available() checks /api/tags endpoint and returns bool
Model is configurable and passed correctly in API request

requirements.text: The system shall track agent status transitions: idle → running (task assigned / debate turn) → idle (turn complete) or blocked (waiting for input/merge).

tests.description: GET /api/agents/{id}/status returns current status
PATCH /api/agents/{id}/status accepts valid transition idle -> running
PATCH /api/agents/{id}/status rejects invalid transition idle -> blocked
Status change emits agent_status_change system event

requirements.text: Agent processes shall run in isolated working directories (git worktrees). The backend shall manage worktree creation and cleanup.

tests.description: create_worktree produces correct path and branch name from task slug and provider
cleanup_worktree removes worktree directory and deletes branch
Worktree base directory is configurable and defaults to ../agent-orchestrator-worktrees/

requirements.text: Agent sessions shall support checkpoint-based resume. On resume, the system shall load a compact context pack rather than replaying the full transcript.

tests.description: Test save() creates an artifact with type='checkpoint' containing serialized CheckpointPack
Test load_latest returns the most recently saved CheckpointPack for a conversation
Test save() updates conversation.summary_snapshot and latest_artifact_id
Test round-trip: build -> compact -> save -> load_latest produces equivalent CheckpointPack

requirements.text: The system shall load configuration from environment variables with sensible defaults. Key config: DB_PATH, HOST, PORT, DEV_MODE, OLLAMA_URL.

tests.description: Test default config values are used when no environment variables are set
Test that environment variables override default config values
Test that DEV_MODE=true is parsed correctly from string env var

requirements.text: Agent personality profiles shall be loaded from config/personalities.json. Each profile defines system prompt fragments, temperature, and behavioral constraints.

Test load_personalities returns empty dict when file does not exist

requirements.text: Provider-specific configuration (API keys, base URLs, model lists) shall be stored in environment variables, never in the database.

tests.description: Test default config values are used when no environment variables are set
Test that environment variables override default config values
Test that DEV_MODE=true is parsed correctly from string env var

requirements.text: All API errors shall return the standard envelope with ok: false and a human-readable error message. HTTP status codes shall be appropriate (400, 404, 409, 500).

tests.description: Task with unmet dependencies cannot transition to implementing, returns 409
Task with all dependencies done can transition to implementing
Task with empty depends_on_json transitions freely
Unhandled exceptions return 500 with envelope format and no stack trace
Pydantic ValidationError returns 400 with field-level error details
Custom NotFoundError returns 404 with envelope
Custom ConflictError returns 409 with envelope

requirements.text: Agent process failures (crash, timeout, rate limit) shall be captured and surfaced as system events in the conversation, not silently swallowed.

tests.description: create_agent_failure_event inserts system_notice event with correct metadata
Crash error event includes agent_id and error classification in metadata
Failure events appear in GET /api/conversations/{id}/messages timeline
